form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1710m after being wide early at Goulburn beaten 30 m by Where Back (2:02.20) in NR up to 62 on March 30 at $101. Before that, was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1740m at Bankstown, beaten 35 m by Flo Ryda (2:09.70) in NR up to 57 on March 16 at $13. Capable of more than she has shown recently. The ace draw can spark improvement.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 8th (Sr4) over 2125m at this track was 9th-19.18 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Major Art (2:34.00) in NR up to 80 on April 9 at $61. The run before 5th (Sr4) over 2125m at this track was 7th-9.15 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Rudy Gee (2:35.50) in NR up to 63 on March 26 at $6.50. Closer draw this time and is better placed.
